records.ety: [L. emittere to send out; e out + mittere to send. See Mission.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Emitted (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Emitting.]

defs: To send forth; to throw or give out; to cause to issue; to give vent to; to eject; to discharge; as, fire emits heat and smoke; boiling water emits steam; the sun emits light.
quotes: Lest, wrathful, the far-shooting god emit His fatal arrows.

defs: To issue forth, as an order or decree; to print and send into circulation, as notes or bills of credit.
quotes: No State shall . . . emit bills of credit.
